reviewer: agent matrix pass (runner-evidenced + screenshots read + real-inference verified + dtype measured), revision 2

rubric.evidence: conformance (wasm, headless no-GPU): 2✓ 0✗ 0▨ 0◍ — loads-clean=pass, calls-real-inference=pass. screenshots: reports/responsive/screens/mobileclip-zero-shot/desktop.png, reports/responsive/screens/mobileclip-zero-shot/mobile.png

AGENT VERDICT: real headless-Chrome run on the cats sample ranked correctly — insideRows top row 'a photo of two cats 0.2582 25.82 99.99%' (cosine·logit·softmax), other labels near zero. 512-d image + text embeddings, cosine in shared space. Correct zero-shot-image-classification output. screenshots: reports/responsive/screens/mobileclip-zero-shot/{desktop,mobile}.png
rubric.notes: Two-tower load (vision+text projection models) computes cosine → scaled logits → softmax; matches CLIP semantics.

rubric.evidence: conformance: declares-model-id/task/backend/quantisation/inference-off-main-thread all pass. MEASUREMENT (dtype honesty): quantising the VISION tower to q8 measurably FLIPS the ranking on the cats sample (winner→'a photo of a dog', cos all ~0.06-0.10) vs fp16/fp32 (winner→cats, cos 0.24); the TEXT tower tolerates q8. So the page ships vision fp16 + text q8 and says so at-a-glance and in 'How the API works'. Verified in Node (test-mix) AND in-browser WASM.
rubric.notes: This is an honest, evidence-backed dtype choice — not the generic q8 default; the page does not overclaim q8.

rubric.evidence: AGENT VERDICT: two-visit headless test — visit 1 Download (fresh profile), visit 2 auto-initialised to state=ready with NO Download button (only 'Clear cached model'). Notable because this is a CUSTOM two-tower load, not the standard pipeline: model-cache still detects both Xenova/mobileclip_s0 tower files and auto-inits. Verified via scripts/verify-cached.mjs.
rubric.notes: createModelLoader key = runtime::modelId::dtype; both towers cache under the same modelId path so integrity check + auto-init work.

rubric.evidence: conformance (wasm, headless no-GPU): 2✓ 0✗ 0▨ 2◍ — live-status-region=pass, errors-on-the-page=pass, honest-progress-retry-offline=manual, runs-without-webgpu-fallback=manual. screenshots: reports/responsive/screens/mobileclip-zero-shot/desktop.png, reports/responsive/screens/mobileclip-zero-shot/mobile.png
rubric.notes: auto-checkable parts pass; manual-evidenced parts need an agent to Read the screenshot and confirm real output / controls / parity.
auto-checkable parts pass; manual-evidenced parts need an agent to Read the screenshot and confirm real output / controls / parity.

rubric.evidence: AGENT VERDICT: bars/cosines/latency are all produced by the on-device two-tower run — the See-inside table shows the real cosine·logit·softmax per label and separate vision/text encode ms. No canned path in source; failures surface via .status.err. screenshots: reports/responsive/screens/mobileclip-zero-shot/{desktop,mobile}.png
rubric.notes: Latency readout is real performance.now() timing around each encode, not a claim.

rubric.evidence: conformance (wasm, headless no-GPU): 2✓ 0✗ 0▨ 0◍ — images-have-alt=pass, buttons-have-names=pass. screenshots: reports/responsive/screens/mobileclip-zero-shot/desktop.png, reports/responsive/screens/mobileclip-zero-shot/mobile.png

AGENT VERDICT: matrix pass on 1280×800 + 360×740 (DPR3) — responsive-check reported desktop clean · mobile clean (no overflow, no clipped controls, no sub-24px targets, clean console + network). Read both screenshots: the two-column .field-row (image | labels) reflows to a single column on mobile, textarea + preview are inline-size:100%, no overflow. support set ok/ok. screenshots: reports/responsive/screens/mobileclip-zero-shot/{desktop,mobile}.png
rubric.notes: .field-row uses flex-wrap + .field-col {flex:1 1 280px; min-inline-size:0} (css-layout guidance) so long labels/URLs never force horizontal overflow.
auto-checkable parts pass; manual-evidenced parts need an agent to Read the screenshot and confirm real output / controls / parity.

guidanceConsulted.query: responsive control panel without horizontal overflow
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Flexbox with flex:1 1 <basis>, flex-wrap:wrap, min-inline-size:0 on flex items with long content (labels/URLs), logical properties instead of fixed widths.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — .field-row is flex-wrap; .field-col {flex:1 1 280px; min-inline-size:0}; textarea + preview inline-size:100%. Two-up on desktop, single column on mobile, no horizontal overflow (verified 1280×800 + 360×740).

guidanceConsulted.query: break up long tasks INP responsiveness
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Move heavy synchronous work off the main thread so input/paint stay responsive.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — both encoders and the cosine/softmax math run in models/mobileclip-zero-shot/worker.js (a Web Worker); the wild page runs the loop off-thread too so the live feed never janks.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: conformance inference-off-main-thread=pass; source uses new Worker(worker.js)

guidanceConsulted.query: accessible loading progress and keyboard-operable custom controls
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Live regions for status, labelled keyboard-operable controls, visible focus, meaningful roles.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — loader + run status use role=status aria-live; the similarity bars are role=meter with aria-valuenow/aria-label; textarea + buttons are labelled; sample thumbs + dropzone are keyboard-operable (Enter/Space) with :focus-visible.

guidanceConsulted.query: canvas content exposed to assistive tech (webcam frame / crop)
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Canvas pixels aren't exposed to AT; provide accessible parallel content (HTML-in-canvas layoutsubtree is experimental / non-Baseline).
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied (fallback path) — the wild-page capture canvas is offscreen scratch; the live
guidanceConsulted.evidence: wild page: <video aria-label> + text bars; capture canvas is not the output surface

openQuestions: The text tower (~43 MB q8) dominates download; is a smaller text quant (uint8) worth offering as an option without hurting ranking?
On WebGPU-capable devices, would a webgpu path materially cut the vision encode further (currently WASM-only for cross-device honesty)?

followUpGoals.goal: Add a size/latency comparison note or badge that pulls the real numbers from the multi-model race so users see MobileCLIP-S0 vs ViT-B/16 without running it.

summary: Revision-2 agent matrix pass for mobileclip-zero-shot (zero-shot-image-classification, Xenova/mobileclip_s0, wasm). Real in-browser inference verified in headless Chrome (correct ranking on the cats sample), auto-init-on-cached verified over two visits, mobile+desktop matrix clean with screenshots read, guidance (css-layout, break-up-long-tasks, accessibility, expose-canvas-content-to-browser-features) applied. Notable honesty: vision runs fp16 not q8 because q8 vision MEASURABLY flips the ranking (evidence retained). Support ok on both classes.
